headline: Snap-on Incorporated Declares Quarterly Dividend; Announces $500 Million Share Repurchase Authorization
summary: KENOSHA, Wis., April 30, 2026--The Snap-on Incorporated board of directors today declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $2.44 per share payable June 10, 2026.
